transcription.text: These are your targets. On the neck, behind the ear, inside the elbow. Now good luck on your first solo bite. Mission accomplished. Excellent. Ah, look, a commemoration. Mmm, it smells sweet and good, like RAID! RAID Flying Insect Killer. The patented clean-smelling formula kills bugs dead with no unpleasant odor. Get RAID from Johnson Wax.
